chain_name.description: Specifies the name of the snapshot chain, used to group related snapshots for incremental backups or other purposes.

description.description: Provides a human-readable description for the snapshot, detailing its purpose or usage.

labels.description: Key-value pairs to organize and categorize the snapshot; must comply with GCP label naming and formatting rules.

name.description: Name of the snapshot to be created, must be unique within the project and comply with naming conventions.

snapshot_encryption_key.description: Specifies the customer-managed encryption key used to encrypt the snapshot, requiring the key to exist in Google Cloud Key Management Service.
snapshot_encryption_key.type: list(object({kms_key_self_link: optional(string),kms_key_service_account: optional(string),raw_key: optional(string),rsa_encrypted_key: optional(string),sha256: optional(string)}))

source_disk.description: Specifies the disk to create the snapshot from; must be an existing disk in the same project and zone.

source_disk_encryption_key.description: Defines the encryption key used to decrypt the source disk. Must match the key used when the disk was originally encrypted.

storage_locations.description: Specifies the geographic locations where the snapshot will be stored; must be valid Google Cloud storage locations.

timeouts.description: Defines the timeout durations for create, update, and delete operations of the snapshot, ensuring operations complete within specified limits.

zone.description: Specifies the zone of the source disk for the snapshot; must match the zone where the disk resides.
